title: Precision Defined 11-Inch Paint Tray 2-Pack, Durable Paint Roller Tray with Comfortable Grip, Sturdy Base, 800ML Large Capacity Pan for Painting Fence, Walls, Furnitures and More, Black
features: DESIGNED FOR EASY PAINTING The handy paint tray features a durable and ergonomic design with a ribbed roll-off area, ensuring even paint application with any standard roller. Its plastic paint tray material is solvent-resistant and includes a wide 11-inch surface, perfect for 9-10 inch rollers. This extra width minimizes mess, prevents splatters, and ensures even paint distribution for smooth results.

SPACIOUS SIZE FOR LARGE PROJECTS With dimensions of 41.7x31.8x6.8 cm, this paint pans trays holds up to 800ML of paint, making it ideal for large-scale projects like walls, ceilings, and fences. The oversized tray reduces the need for frequent refills, saving time and energy. Professional-grade design makes it a reliable choice for both DIY home renovations and commercial painting tasks.

VERSATILE FOR MULTIPLE USES This painters tray is perfect for painting walls, ceilings, furniture, and even creative projects like acrylic art. Its versatility extends to use as a mixing container for custom colors or additives, providing unmatched flexibility. Whether you’re tackling crafts or professional jobs, this plastic paint trays set adapts to every task with ease.

ACCOMMODATES LARGER ROLLERS Specifically designed to fit 9–10 inch rollers, this paint roller pan ensures maximum efficiency for broad surface applications. The extra width makes it easy to evenly load paint on rollers, while the ridged surface removes excess paint, preventing drips and uneven coating. A must-have paint can roller tray for large and small projects alike.

REDUCES FATIGUE AND BOOSTS EFFICIENCY The larger size of this disposable paint tray not only minimizes refills but also reduces fatigue by eliminating constant trips to refill paint. Professionals and DIYers alike will appreciate the smooth workflow and convenience of this plastic paint tray, which combines durability with efficiency to complete projects faster.
description: Product Description Sturdy Feet for Stability Keep your workspace secure with our paint tray's robust base design. No more sliding or wobbling during your home improvement projects. Smart Grid Wipes Paint Clean Innovative angled grid pattern ensures perfect paint distribution and helps remove excess paint from your roller with ease. Built to Last, Built Strong Reinforced edges provide long-lasting durability, making these paint trays a reliable companion for professional and DIY painters alike. Convenient Brush Storage Integrated paintbrush holders keep your tools organized and within reach, streamlining your painting workflow. Previous page All-in-One Painting Solution One tray, multiple tools. Designed for maximum flexibility, our paint tray supports rollers, brushes 800ml Paint Capacity Generous 800ml paint capacity. Perfect any large project, with ample space to load paint efficiently Ideal for 9-Inch & 10-Inch Rollers Integrated features make painting smoother, faster, and more precise for pros and DIY enthusiasts. Next page 1 Seamless Painting 2 800ml Paint Capacity 3 9-Inch & 10-Inch Rollers Built for Every & Any Painting Job Smooth Interior Painting Tackle indoor walls with ease. Our paint tray's design ensures even coverage and minimizes mess for flawless interior painting results. Exterior Painting Made Simple Conquer outdoor surfaces with confidence. Wide roller compatibility and sturdy design perfect for comprehensive exterior painting projects. Precision in Narrow Spaces Navigate tricky corners and tight spots effortlessly. Compact design and versatile tools help you paint with professional precision. Fence Painting Transform wooden surfaces with minimal effort. Deep paint pocket and ergonomic design make fence painting quick and clean. Pair with Precision Defined's Paint Tray Liners Precision Liners, Perfect Protection Keep your paint trays pristine and simplify cleanup with our custom-fitted liners. Designed to match our 11-inch paint trays, these disposable liners prevent paint buildup, protect your tray's surface, and make post-project cleanup a breeze. Instant Cleanup, Zero Hassle Say goodbye to scrubbing and soaking! Our paint tray liners create a protective barrier that captures every drop of paint. Simply remove and dispose of the liner for a spotless tray every time. Maximum convenience, minimal effort.
